prompt: A mystical digital forest with glowing translucent trees, inhabited by ethereal creatures and soft, ambient light.

Several ethereal, translucent creatures, appearing as luminous forms of light or mist, are gracefully dispersed among the trees. The entire scene is bathed in a soft, ambient light, creating a serene and otherworldly atmosphere.
objects: translucent trees glowing softly from within
luminous creatures (forms of light or mist)
creatures gracefully dispersed among the trees
